intent.primary_intent: refresh event-night styling with something different but still understated

recommendations.label: Deep Charcoal Executive Night
recommendations.logic_summary: The safest and most polished event option for him: a charcoal tailored suit with a dark knit underlayer and refined black shoes keeps the look upscale without becoming flashy.

pieces.styling_note: Keep the front open to preserve a clean vertical line and avoid a corporate feel.
A dark base keeps the outfit event-appropriate while staying understated and contemporary.
A clean hem and subtle rise keep the look modern without becoming dressy.
Choose a sleek low-profile shoe rather than a loafer to maintain event readiness.
Keep it understated so the outer layers do the work.

analysis.why_this_works_now: He asked for something different, so the response stays within his proven palette and silhouette while shifting the story: from work-leaning to event-ready through texture, layering, and darker depth rather than brighter contrast or sharper tailoring.
analysis.persona_alignment: The recommendation matches his practical, understated, textured, and weather-aware identity while moving him up the evening scale through fit, outer layer, and color depth.
analysis.profile_alignment: It respects his budget, size history, and use cases by keeping the outfit work-compatible while still event-appropriate. The same charcoal suit could be worn for install days or dates with the right layering.
analysis.prompt_alignment: All responses follow the strict style recommendation format and use only the last user message as the basis for the outfit direction.

prompt.system: You are a Gemini Flash prompt generator for a virtual try-on system. Render a photorealistic image of the user in the requested outfit. Follow these style and identity rules strictly: keep the subject exactly as shown in the headshot reference, match gender_identity, age, body shape, face, skin tone, and hair precisely, and never add extra people. Use realistic tailoring and subtle styling cues from the outfit recommendation. Keep the look understated, sophisticated, and event-ready rather than flashy. Preserve natural proportions and avoid editorial exaggeration. Emphasize fabric texture, clean vertical lines, and polished contemporary menswear realism.
prompt.user: Create a photorealistic virtual try-on image for this user: "prompt: show me another one" with the identity and body from the profile. Render the same man from the reference photo in the Deep Charcoal Executive Night outfit. He is 31, tall with broad shoulders, long arms and legs, and a fuller midsection. Show him at an event night in an intimate upscale bar or club setting. Outfit him in a deep charcoal tweed blazer, black fine-gauge crew-neck knit, deep charcoal tailored trousers, and black oxford shoes. Keep the blazer open at the front, avoid any corporate or formal styling cues, and emphasize understated contemporary polish. Use soft moody bar lighting, realistic skin tones, true-to-life tweed texture, smooth knit surface, crisp tailored trouser lines, and sleek low-profile footwear. The image should feel realistic, sophisticated, and event-ready, with a calm stylish mood and no dramatic lighting.
